'''Dray beasts''' were skeletal, eight-legged herd creatures used to pull carts on [[Farm/Legends|farms]], a common sight on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]] and [[Azbrian]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''
